title: Device Home Screen - Quick Settings modal
scenario: Quick Settings modal opens on Device Home Screen when tapping any Quick Settings option configured in Device Settings
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
2. Ensure the device is connected and the Device Home Screen is displayed.
3. Tap on any Quick Settings option (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) available on the Device Home Screen.
4. Observe the modal that opens with all options related to the selected setting.
5. Change a setting via the modal (e.g., toggle ANC on/off, adjust EQ preset).
6. Repeat steps 3-5 for each available Quick Settings option as configured in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
expected: A modal opens with all options related to the selected Quick Setting, allowing the user to change the setting directly from the modal. This works consistently for all Quick Settings configured in Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection.
